name: Avocode
description: Avocode — Design handoff tool that exports CSS, Swift, and Android code from PSD, Sketch, and XD files.

seo.title: Avocode — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Avocode: Avocode — Design handoff tool that exports CSS, Swift, and Android code from PSD, Sketch, and XD files.

when_to_use: Exporting CSS values directly from a Figma design handoff
Generating Swift UI code from a PSD without manual measuring
Extracting Android XML from XD files for mobile dev
Automating asset export and color-token extraction

pros: Exports CSS, Swift, Android code from designs
cons: Service has been winding down publicly
Generated code still needs manual cleanup
Figma has largely absorbed this workflow
review.verdict: Once a handoff leader, now eclipsed by Figma Dev Mode — check availability before committing.
review.best_for: Teams still working in PSD or Sketch who need automated code export
review.not_for: Figma-first teams or anyone starting fresh in 2026
